'''鈭歫-sh-f-g''' ('''kajashfegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lactoferment|lactoferment]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-sh-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lactoferment|lactoferment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-sh-f-g
|-
! Lemma
| kajashfegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijashfegoko|thijashfegoko]] || [[word:jijashfegoko|jijashfegoko]] || [[word:shijashfegoko|shijashfegoko]] || [[word:kijashfegoko|kijashfegoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
